content.json:
# Tailscale Operations (Standard)

Security and operational view across the **Tailscale Standard (CCF)** data connector. Surfaces configuration audit data (`Tailscale_Configuration_CL`).

For network flow visibility, upgrade your tailnet to Premium / Enterprise and install **Tailscale Premium (CCF)** + use the **Tailscale Operations (Premium)** workbook.

content.title: Configuration audit summary

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Action
| render timechart
content.title: Configuration activity over time, by action

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| where isnotempty(ActorLogin)
| summarize EventCount = count() by ActorLogin
| top 10 by EventCount
| render barchart
content.title: Top 10 actors

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize EventCount = count() by tostring(Target.type)
| top 10 by EventCount
| render piechart
content.title: Target type distribution

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName), TargetType = tostring(Target.type)
| summarize EventCount = count() by ActorLogin, Action, TargetType
| order by EventCount desc
content.title: Actor / Action / Target heatmap

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tostring(Target.type) == "ACL"
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, OldPolicy = Old, NewPolicy = New
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: ACL policy change history

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tostring(Target.type) == "AUTH_KEY"
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName), Reusable = tostring(New.reusable), Ephemeral = tostring(New.ephemeral)
| project TimeGenerated, Action, ActorLogin, KeyId = tostring(Target.id), Reusable, Ephemeral, Description = tostring(New.description)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Auth key lifecycle

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tostring(Target.type) in ("API_KEY", "OAUTH_CLIENT")
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| project TimeGenerated, Action, ActorLogin, Type = tostring(Target.type), TargetId = tostring(Target.id), Description = tostring(New.description)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: API token and OAuth client activity

content.json:
## Security Signals

Incidents and alerts raised by Tailscale-related analytic rules.

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertName startswith "Tailscale"
| summarize Count = count() by AlertName, AlertSeverity
| order by Count desc
content.title: Tailscale alerts by rule

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertName startswith "Tailscale"
| summarize Count = count() by AlertSeverity
| render piechart
content.title: Severity distribution

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertName startswith "Tailscale"
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, Description, Entities
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent Tailscale alerts
